title: US-Iran peace deal: Trump signs MoU at Versailles, confirms White House; Pakistan says agreement takes effect
content:
US President Trump signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) for a peace deal with Iran at Versailles.
*   The White House officially confirmed the signing of the agreement.
*   Pakistan announced that the US-Iran peace agreement has now taken effect.

title: RBI allows banks to offer higher interest rates to NRIs/PIOs to mobilise forex
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The RBI has permitted Indian banks to offer more attractive interest rates to Non-Resident Indians (NRIs) and Persons of Indian Origin (PIOs).
*   This move allows banks to provide higher returns on deposits, specifically targeting funds from the NRI/PIO community.
*   The primary goal of this policy is to encourage and mobilize greater inflows of foreign exchange into India.

title: Watch: Trump signs US-Iran deal MoU during dinner with Macron, says 'this was not easy'
content:
President Trump signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) concerning a US-Iran deal.
*   The signing took place during a dinner meeting with French President Emmanuel Macron.
*   Trump commented on the difficulty of the agreement, stating it "was not easy."
